metadata.title: CRM | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Adon ERP CRM helps your team capture leads, manage pipelines, automate follow-ups, and turn every opportunity into revenue.

hero.title: Customer Relationship
hero.description: Adon ERP CRM helps your team capture leads, manage pipelines, automate follow-ups, and turn every opportunity into revenue.

pipelineSection.title: Track opportunities
pipelineSection.subtitle: easily in the sales software
pipelineSection.description: Keep every deal visible from first contact to close. Adon CRM gives your sales team a clean pipeline, next actions, deal values, and customer context in one place.

features.nextActivity: See next activity and deal value instantly
features.customerNotes: Keep all customer notes attached to the opportunity

followupSection.title: Never miss out on a
followupSection.description: Schedule calls, emails, meetings, and reminders so every lead gets attention at the right time.

communicationSection.title: Customer management with
communicationSection.subtitle: communication
communicationSection.description: Centralize calls, emails, live chat, SMS, and notes inside the customer timeline so your team always knows what happened last.

quotationSection.title: Attractive quotations
quotationSection.description: Convert opportunities into polished quotations with products, pricing, taxes, discounts, and terms already connected to your ERP.

analyticsSection.title: Turn reporting data
analyticsSection.subtitle: into money
analyticsSection.description: See where revenue comes from, which activities convert best, and where your team should focus next.

pipelineAutomation.title: Pipeline automation
pipelineAutomation.description: Move leads through your sales process automatically with smart stages, actions, and reminders.

aiLeadScoring.title: AI lead scoring
aiLeadScoring.description: Prioritize the right opportunities using engagement, activity, source, and deal value.

followupReminders.title: Follow-up reminders
followupReminders.description: Never miss a customer conversation with automated alerts, tasks, and next-step planning.

quotationBuilder.title: Quotation builder
quotationBuilder.description: Create polished proposals and quotations from CRM opportunities in just a few clicks.

customerTimeline.title: Customer timeline
customerTimeline.description: Track emails, calls, meetings, notes, deals, and activities in one complete customer profile.

salesAnalytics.title: Sales analytics
salesAnalytics.description: Visualize revenue, win rate, team performance, and forecasts with live dashboards.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand your CRM workflow across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern sales teams
ctaSection.description: Teams use Adon CRM to manage leads, communicate better, close faster, and grow revenue with confidence.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Build stronger customer relationships with a CRM that connects your sales, marketing, service, and operations.
